text.title: Fitness Functions as Code Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for fitness-functions-as-code.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the codebase architecturally non-trivial with agreed characteristics?

example.trace: ADR 0007 (layered arch) → `test_no_domain_to_infra_imports.py` walks `tach show --json` → asserts zero `domain→infra` edges → run on PR → pass → verdict=pass.
